text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has been throwing herself into her
training for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nice! That was a great sprint session. Next up is
corner drills, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Since I've got a lot of energy left, I should work
on my turns for the last spurt too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay! Huuup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's skills seem to be steadily improving.
Today's been very productive.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nice work today, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready for a bath and some food! I wonder
what's on the menu tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio comes to a halt and stares off at...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I must push myself even harder!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...McQueen's still at it today too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. I'm in great shape right now, right?
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?
What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just answer me! I'm getting stronger every day,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants me to affirm her skill, but there's really
no need...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's what I thought! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Um... I want to do a scrimmage with McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's really getting to me! What Prez said that time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
How I'll never be able to beat McQueen, no
matter how many times we race...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, please! Let me race a scrimmage against
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, as her trainer, I'm interested to see
how such a race would play out myself. I give her
permission to do the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm all ready to go! You better watch
yourself, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I could say the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm in no position to lose, after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The scrimmage against Mejiro McQueen begins...

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen keeps her lead going into the
fourth corner!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio just can't keep up! The gap keeps on
widening and... Mejiro McQueen reaches the
finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Victory is mine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
M-McQueen! You gotta tell me when you decide
what race you're entering next!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And what will you do then?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you on again, duh! I'm beating you next
time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...A pointless notion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times you face me, the
outcome will never change. I will always win.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: They were right... I couldn't beat her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wonder why Prez was so sure McQueen would
win...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She knew I'd lose... Said it was because I was
lacking something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the past few days, Teio has been working
toward the Japan Cup with a strong, positive
attitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, these events might make things a little
more complicated.
